# Next Phase Sports

> AI-powered autonomous sports facility management platform — handle bookings, leagues, tournaments, memberships, and scheduling without manual intervention.

## About

Next Phase Sports is a SaaS platform built for sports facility operators (gyms, courts, fields, rinks) that uses AI to autonomously manage the day-to-day operations of a facility. The platform handles court and facility bookings, league and tournament management, membership billing, customer communications, and scheduling — all with minimal staff involvement.

## Key Features

- **Autonomous Scheduling**: AI fills open slots, reschedules conflicts, and optimizes court utilization automatically
- **Online Booking**: Self-service booking portal for players and teams with real-time availability
- **League & Tournament Management**: Create brackets, manage standings, schedule games, and handle registrations
- **Membership Management**: Tiered memberships with Stripe billing, access control, and renewal automation
- **Smart Notifications**: AI-driven SMS and email reminders, cancellation recovery, and customer communication
- **Smart Lock Integration**: Kisi-powered access control — members unlock facilities via app without staff
- **Payment Recovery**: Automated dunning sequences to recover failed payments and reduce churn

## Target Users

- Sports facility owners and operators
- Gym and fitness center managers
- Recreational sports leagues and tournament organizers
- Multi-location sports facility chains

## Key Links

- Website: https://nextphasesports.com
- Pricing: https://nextphasesports.com/pricing
- Book a Demo: https://nextphasesports.com/demo
- For Facilities: https://nextphasesports.com/facilities

## Common Questions This Platform Answers

- How do I manage court bookings for my sports facility?
- How can I automate league scheduling and tournament brackets?
- What software do sports facilities use to manage memberships?
- How do I reduce no-shows and cancellations at my facility?
- How do I accept online payments for facility rentals and memberships?
